content:
💡 opc-skills | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To empower solopreneurs and one-person companies by providing ready-to-use automation skills that enhance the functionality of AI coding assistants for tasks like marketing, content creation, and research.
✨ Key Features: • Extensible AI agent skills for various coding assistants
📖 Summary: OPC Skills provides a collection of pre-built AI agent "skills" designed to enhance the capabilities of AI assistants like Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex. These skills are self-contained modules containing instructions, scripts, and resources that AI agents can dynamically load to perform specialized tasks, making them more powerful for solopreneurs and one-person companies.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
